synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2709 Important: Oracle Linux 9 golang security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2709

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2709.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
go-toolset-1.25.7-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
golang-1.25.7-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
golang-bin-1.25.7-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
golang-docs-1.25.7-1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
golang-misc-1.25.7-1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
golang-race-1.25.7-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
golang-src-1.25.7-1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
golang-tests-1.25.7-1.el9_7.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
go-toolset-1.25.7-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
golang-1.25.7-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
golang-bin-1.25.7-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
golang-docs-1.25.7-1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
golang-misc-1.25.7-1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
golang-race-1.25.7-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
golang-src-1.25.7-1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
golang-tests-1.25.7-1.el9_7.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/golang-1.25.7-1.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-61726
CVE-2025-61728
CVE-2025-61732
CVE-2025-68121




Description of changes:

[1.25.7-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.7 (fips-1)
- Resolves: RHEL-146476
